nasb.text: He went and found his body thrown on the road with the donkey and the lion standing beside the body; the lion had not eaten the body nor torn the donkey.

esv.text: And he went and found his body thrown in the road, and the donkey and the lion standing beside the body. The lion had not eaten the body or torn the donkey.

cnv.text: 於是他去了，看見神人的屍體被丟在路上，驢子和獅子都站在屍體旁邊，那獅子並沒有吃掉屍體，也沒有撕裂驢子。

ccb.text: 去了那里，看见上帝仆人的尸体倒在路上，驴和狮子站在尸体旁。狮子既没有吃尸体，也没有伤害驴。
